raw_response: I fully concur with the consensus. One additional point worth noting is that while severe burning pain can be indicative of herpes zoster, particularly during the prodromal phase before the eruption occurs, it does not serve as a definitive diagnostic criterion for differentiating between herpes zoster and other vesiculobullous eruptions.
